name: S-16 --emit-applied writes a JSON summary of demote/restore actions per the architecture audit surface
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch tree/g && printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, rule_state: block, provenance: [{class: published-standard, source: g}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --apply-to-rules --tree tree --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit-applied applied.json && [ -s applied.json ] && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("applied.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.r&&j.r.action==="auto-demoted"?0:1)' && echo summary 1>&2
